connections.gloss: farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully), rejoice
connections.def: a primary verb; to be "cheer"ful, i.e. calmly happy or well-off; impersonally, especially as salutation (on meeting or parting), be well:--farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully),…
probably from 5465; hail:--hail. see GREEK for
